meta.title: How the world found out about America's STEALTH Black Hawks
meta.description:
In May of 2011, two highly classified stealth Black Hawk helicopters were used in Operation Neptune Spear — the covert operation that would ultimately kill Osama Bin Laden. 

After one of the two helicopters crashed, the operators from SEAL Team 6 destroyed it to prevent its stealth technologies from falling into the wrong hands... but the next day, images in the press proved that they had left the tail section intact.

https://www.thedrive.com/the-war-zone/25890/origins-of-stealth-black-hawks-date-back-over-33-years-before-the-bin-laden-raid
